subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the lights shining from the Kingdom of God! Verily I have read thy eloquent letter and wonderful epistle... Know thou, verily, I say unto thee that the conditions of this mortal world
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المنجذبه بانوار ساطعه من ملکوت الله انی قرئت رقیمتک البلیغه و نمیقتک
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God
